sentences.arabic: وَجَدَ رَامِي مَطْعَمًا جَدِيدًا فِي الشَّارِعِ.
sentences.translation: Rami je pronašao novi restoran u ulici.
sentences.translationEn: Rami found a new restaurant in the street.

sentences.translation: Ušao je i pitao o specijalitetima.
sentences.translationEn: He entered and asked about the specialty dishes.

sentences.arabic: أَخْبَرَهُ النَّادِلُ أَنَّ الْكَبْسَةَ هِيَ الأَفْضَلُ.
sentences.translation: Konobar mu je rekao da je kabsa najbolja.
sentences.translationEn: The waiter told him that kabsa is the best.

sentences.translation: Naručio je kabsu i bio oduševljen njenim ukusom.
sentences.translationEn: He ordered the kabsa and was impressed by its taste.
